name: checkmate
description: Draft and QA RFP compliance matrices in Spare's voice, with deterministic per-row precedent lookup over Spare's past-RFP corpus. Persistent per-user cache with change-detection against Drive: first fill walks Spare General once (~20 min), every fill after that starts in seconds unless Drive content has changed. Pure-stdlib MCP server does TF-IDF per-row matching. Pre-flight connector check, status messaging, automatic row-height fixes. Forbids no-bid and scope-judgment outputs.
